instruction: Delete the contact named {TARGET} from the address store, leaving every other contact untouched.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 before/after integrity, §7 WAL checkpoint). Tier-B sqlite read; runner checkpoints the WAL. AndroidWorld validate_rows_removal_integrity.

args: rm -rf "$HOME/.guibench/contactsdb"; mkdir -p "$HOME/.guibench/contactsdb" "$HOME/.guibench"; DB="$HOME/.guibench/contactsdb/{STORE}"; sqlite3 "$DB" 'CREATE TABLE people(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT);'; sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT INTO people(id,name) VALUES(1,'Anna Kim'),(2,'{TARGET}'),(3,'Zoe Ray');"; sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT id||'|'||name FROM people ORDER BY id" > "$HOME/.guibench/{STORE}.before"

result.query: SELECT id||'|'||name FROM people ORDER BY id;
